data.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Decreases Slightly
data.description: According to PANews, data from Cloverpool indicates that Bitcoin mining difficulty has been adjusted at block height 901,152. The mining difficulty has decreased by 0.45%, bringing it down to 126.41 T.

data.title: LBANK EDGE has launched FAITH(FAITH)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBANK EDGE has launched FAITH (FAITH) at 19:40 (SGT) on June 14, and opened the FAITH/USDT trading pair. At present, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 20:00 (SGT) on June 15.
It is reported that FAITH is a community-driven Meme token based on BNB Chain. LBANK EDGE provides its trading users with a "transaction compensation" benefit. If there is a loss, a maximum subsidy of 100 USDT can be obtained. The activity ends at 19:40 on June 16.
LBANK EDGE is a trading zone that integrates cutting-edge value discovery mechanisms and institutional-level liquidity. It aims to accurately discover high-potential assets while providing excellent liquidity support and a multi-level user protection system.

data.title: Circle Launches USDC on XRP Ledger to Boost Cross-Chain Liquidity
data.description:
Circle has officially introduced the USD Coin (USDC) on the XRP Ledger, a significant development aimed at enhancing cross-chain liquidity within the cryptocurrency ecosystem. This strategic move seeks to facilitate smoother transactions, improve accessibility, and increase the utility of USDC across different blockchains, thereby fostering a more interconnected financial landscape.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/ampstories/web-stories/circle-launches-usdc-on-xrp-ledger-to-boost-cross-chain-liquidity

data.title: Echo Protocol's official X account was hacked, the team said the protocol security was not affected
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Echo Protocol team member @jonphayyy posted that the project's official X platform account has been hacked, and the abnormal content currently released is not released by the team. Users should not click or interact with related links.
The team said that this incident did not affect user funds and data, and the protocol itself remains completely safe. Echo Protocol is working with the X platform to promote account recovery, and reminds users to help report if they find suspicious content.

data.title: Echo Protocol's Official Account Compromised, User Funds Remain Secure
data.description: According to Odaily, a member of the Echo Protocol team, @jonphayyy, announced that the project's official account on the X platform has been compromised. The team clarified that any unusual content currently being posted is not from them, and users are advised not to click or interact with related links. Despite the breach, the team assured that user funds and data remain unaffected, and the protocol itself is completely secure. Echo Protocol is collaborating with the X platform to restore the account and urges users to report any suspicious content they encounter.

data.title: Eastcom Peace will work with China Telecom Research Institute and TreeGraph Research Institute to explore the application of stablecoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Shenzhen Stock Exchange listed company Dongxin Heping said in an institutional survey on June 13 that global supervision of stablecoin issuers has become clearer, covering compliance licenses, asset reserve transparency, risk management and consumer protection. The company will rely on blockchain, 5G and security technology, and work with China Telecom Research Institute and Shanghai TreeGraph Research Institute to focus on the layout of the blockchain "warm" wallet (BSIM) and explore the application of stablecoins in payment, cross-border settlement and digital assets. (Jiemian News)

data.title: Echo Protocol’s uBTC assets worth more than $266 million were stolen, possibly due to supply chain attacks
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement of Echo Protocol, its main wallet holding 2,515.648579 uBTC (currently valued at approximately US$267 million) suffered a security incident in a complex supply chain attack. At present, the project party has launched an investigation and will work with the audit and security teams to deal with it, and will release a detailed post-analysis report after obtaining complete information.
The current platform vault mortgage rate is 20%. In order to ensure system security, the withdrawal function will be temporarily closed from midnight today, Eastern Time. Echo Protocol said that it will announce a bounty plan later to encourage the community to help trace the flow of funds.

data.title: Echo Protocol Faces Complex Supply Chain Attack, Halts Withdrawals
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Echo Protocol, a platform for Bitcoin liquidity re-staking and yield layers, reported a sophisticated supply chain attack on its wallet containing 2,515.648579 uBTC, valued at over $266 million. The wallet has been maliciously breached, prompting the team to initiate an urgent investigation and commit to releasing a detailed incident report soon.

In response to the attack, the collateral rate of the platform's treasury has dropped to 20%. To ensure system security, all withdrawal operations have been suspended starting midnight Eastern Time.

Echo Protocol is actively collaborating with auditing firms and security experts to address the situation. Additionally, the platform plans to announce a bounty program to encourage individuals with information to assist in tracking the stolen assets.
